programme.title: Buscando el amor
programme.desc: A medida que se acerca el Día de San Valentín, un casamentero debe encontrar una compañera para un emprendedor que cree que permanecer soltero es la clave del éxito.

programme.title: De regreso a casa
programme.desc: Un beisbolista alcohólico ha regresado a su ciudad natal para entrar a un programa de rehabilitación y entrena a un equipo juvenil de béisbol.

programme.title: El Elegido
programme.desc: Un taxista es elegido para personificar a Jesús en una representación de la pasión, pero antes es asaltado y golpeado.

programme.title: Amar para siempre
programme.desc: Lucy debe luchar para impedir que su amor de la infancia tire abajo una hacienda para construir un campo de golf. Mientras buscan un punto medio, descubren que el pasado podría ser la clave para proteger el futuro.

programme.title: Dark Winds
programme.desc: Leaphorn sospecha que todos los crímenes ocurridos en la reserva están relacionados. Leaphorn invita a cenar a Chee. Manuelito realiza un descubrimiento.

programme.title: Dark Winds
programme.desc: Mientras custodia a un sospechoso relevante, Leaphorn descubre que detrás de este crimen hay más de lo que hubiera imaginado. Manuelito se enfrenta a sus peores temores. Chee debe elegir entre su carrera y su pueblo.

programme.title: Dark Winds
programme.desc: Leaphorn, Chee y Manuelito descienden al escondite de la Sociedad Búfalo. Allá dentro, se enfrentan a unas duras decisiones que podrían cambiar el resto de sus vidas.

programme.title: Dark Winds
programme.desc: El policía tribal navajo Joe Leaphorn investiga la muerte de un hombre involucrado en una misteriosa secta, mientras Jim Chee, pluriempleado como detective privado, trabaja en su propio caso.

programme.title: Dark Winds
programme.desc: Leaphorn profundiza en los vínculos personales que lo une a un caso cada vez más enigmático. El sargento Manuelito interroga a Chee, aunque se muestra reluctante a hacerlo. El hallazgo de un cadáver provoca que Leaphorn y Manuelito busquen a un niño.

programme.title: Dark Winds
programme.desc: Chee empieza a actuar por su propia cuenta tras el encuentro con un hombre peligroso. Leaphorn y Manuelito establecen una alianza con el sheriff del departamento, lo que le permite a Leaphorn encontrar una pista muy importante.

programme.title: Dark Winds
programme.desc: Leaphorn pone en peligro su vida durante la persecución de un sospechoso. Manuelito desafía al sheriff con la intención de rescatar a su jefe. Chee reflexiona sobre una propuesta peligrosa que le ofrecerá respuestas sobre el caso.

programme.title: Dark Winds
programme.desc: Leaphorn trabaja a contrarreloj para obtener una confesión de un sospechoso antes de que deje de estar bajo su custodia. Mientras tanto, Chee se introduce de incógnito en la secta que vincula sus distintas investigaciones.

programme.title: Al otro lado del muro: Jennifer agrede a Eliza
programme.desc: Jennifer agarra a golpes a Eliza. Max llega a detener a sus dos mujeres, les pide perdón y exige el divorcio a Jennifer. Alondra le da un zapatazo a Ernesto y la policía la arresta.

programme.title: Sin senos sí hay paraíso
programme.desc: Catalina, de cara a su nueva realidad, está lista para el objetivo: vengarse de la Diabla y su gente. Albeiro y su mujer renunciarían a la herencia, con tal de recuperar a su hija.

programme.title: Sin senos sí hay paraíso
programme.desc: Yésica, la Diabla, está obsesionada con la idea de que Catalina está viva y regresará para vengarse, lo que la perturba constantemente. Pactan un plazo para rescatar a Daniela.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: Sara se muda con el Teca y le aconseja a Manuel que se busque una vida lejos y con otra mujer. El Teca le da una bienvenida memorable. Salvador huye para ver a un narco y encuentra a Begoña.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.sub-title: Sara y El Indio, a muerte
programme.desc: El Indio no le cree nada a Sara y sospecha que tiene algo con el Teca. Manuel se encuentra con la Tuti y su atacante mientras busca a Salvador. Sara planea la captura de Quintanilla.

programme.title: El Barón
programme.desc: La llegada sorpresiva de la Madrina activa las alarmas, pero Isabel, presionada por las circunstancias, desvía su atención para que Nacho gane tiempo. El cargamento cambia de ruta.

programme.title: El Barón
programme.sub-title: La infidelidad a flor de piel
programme.desc: Marcela le deja un mensaje a Nacho. El recado lo oye Isabel y despierta su curiosidad por conocerla. Le hace preguntas incómodas a Nacho.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos: Estrategia
programme.desc: Aurelio le dice a Mónica que fingió su muerte para cobrar venganza a sus enemigos. Ximena se reencuentra con su hijo Heriberto, quien necesita de su ayuda para salir del mundo del narcotráfico.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Willy enfurece al ver a Samantha, semidesnuda y en los brazos de Jesús. Yvonne llama al doctor Velásquez y le dice que ya no se tiene que ocupar de la niña. Jesús salva a Alma de la muerte.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Laura se recupera lentamente. Ángela y Samantha se enfrentan con matones. Miguel y Fabiola se quedan en Colombia para evitar que la niña muera.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Juan Marcos le cuenta a Laura sobre su enfermedad terminal. Fernanda se apodera de Alma. El Mesías le da a Samantha una medalla de mucho valor espiritual para él y le pide un beso.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Miguel, Fabiola, Clara, Camilo y Gustavo quieren quitarle la niña a Fernanda, pero ella se vuelve loca. Matamoros la reduce y rescata a la bebé. Al ingresar en Estados Unidos, la DEA los detiene.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Juan Marcos se niega a defender al grupo detenido por la DEA y Ángela enfurece ante la negativa. Yvonne está embarazada y no sabe quién es el padre. En Colombia, se lleva a cabo un operativo.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Los hombres de Yvonne atrapan a Miguel. Ella le dice a Matamoros que el hijo que espera es de Miguel y él promete ayudarla. Ringo secuestra a Juan Marcos.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Atan a Miguel a una camilla y le sacan un micrófono de la pierna. Yvonne lo amenaza con delatarlo y lo deja tatuado. Juan Marcos pide que lo maten para acabar con la tortura. Laura besa a Gustavo.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Samantha y Matamoros se besan. Fernanda busca a Ángela y Juan Marcos logra liberarse. Bernardo le corta las venas a Miguel e Yvonne, y luego tortura y mata a Rodrigo para vengarse.

programme.title: Struggle Meals

programme.title: Struggle Meals

programme.title: Struggle Meals

programme.title: Struggle Meals

programme.title: Struggle Meals

programme.title: Struggle Meals

programme.title: Struggle Meals

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean: Making Couscous in Tunisia

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: In the ultimate survival experiment, Bear Grylls has abandoned 14 British women on a remote desert island in the Pacific with just the clothes they stand up in and a few basic tools. The survival challenge is harder than ever, as they attempt to live entirely on their own wits for six weeks in the height of the tropical storm season. The women are starving as they enter their sixth and final week on The Island. Having plundered all the resources in the vicinity of their beach, the group are now looking to the ocean to sustain them. The women are pinning all their hopes on their fishing net catching a major haul but so far it's eluded them.

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: In this final episode, after five weeks on the island, the men are struggling to find enough to eat as the island's already depleted resources fail to deliver the coconuts and limpets that have become their staple diet. With energy levels at rock bottom, the island's oldest castaway - 58-year-old car salesman Phil - is forgotten when an unsatisfying watery fish broth is served for lunch.

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: In this special episode of The Island With Bear Grylls takes an in-depth look at life on the islands. On The Island, Bear conducted the ultimate survival challenge to see if 14 men and 14 women could survive for six weeks on an uninhabited island in the Pacific Ocean. They were completely alone, filming everything themselves, with only a handful of basic tools and the clothes they stood up in. They not only had to survive entirely on their own wits for six gruelling weeks, but had to contend with the vicious tropical storm season.

programme.title: Don't You Dare Lift-off
programme.desc: First, Froy, Matt, and Lou turn tail and bail when bats and guns are swung towards them. Later, things get heated for Matt and Sonia just before they head out with Esteban and Lou to ambush a helicopter pilot.

programme.title: Doomsday Prep
programme.desc: The team wonders what's up with Sonia as she wrestles with Lou's big secret. Ronnie goes undercover and takes a gold digging RO out on a date, but when Carlos lets the cat out of the bag all hell breaks loose.

programme.title: Intoxicated Marina Idiots
programme.desc: First, Lou and Sonia are on a hunt for a 2007 Porsche & a 2008 Audi from the same drug dealing debtor. Next, Matt and Froy pry a truck from a group of intoxicated idiots at a marina. And finally, Matt and Lou hit up an upscale Glendale neighborhood to scoop up a BMW from a shoe throwing rich couple.

programme.title: Disaster at the Derby
programme.desc: The team gets back to work, but have their anger management sessions had any effect? Sonia and Lyndah find themselves surrounded by a gang of roller derby girls who've got the skills to protect their car, Lou and Sonia get lost in translation when they're forced to contend with a pair of Russian movers and their yuppie lawyer clients, and Matt, Lou, and Froy are in a battle of the scams when they try to trick a group of con artists into giving up their vehicle.

programme.title: Probation Abomination
programme.desc: Sonia returns, but not before putting the team on probation and laying some ground rules.

programme.title: The Road to Recovery
programme.desc: On this premiere of Operation Repo's brand new season, Sonia's rehabilitation from her gunshot wound takes a shocking turn. The whole team runs into trouble on a job when they attempt to repossess a carnival ride from a group of wannabe carnies, Froy and Matt wrangle with a gym owner and his hired muscle, and Lou, Froy, and Sonia repo a truck from a protester in quite the revealing outfit.

programme.title: Off the Hitch
programme.desc: In this very special episode of Operation Repo, it's the 36 hours that change everything. When Matt, Froy, and Lyndah go on a routine repo gone violently wrong, the bonds that connect the Pizarro family may be torn apart forever.

programme.title: Unwanted Seizures
programme.desc: First, Lou sends Sonia and Matt to repo a Toyota Corolla from a recently divorced debtor determined to keep the car she won in the divorce. Later, Lou cuts a repo short to send Froy and Matt to tail a car until the debtor realizes he's being followed. And Finally, when a debtor goes into a seizure during his seizure of his vehicle, Lou, Sonia, and Lyndah tend to the man while they wait for help to arrive.

programme.title: Breakdowns and Beatdowns
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy head into a bad part of town to find that their target car is owned by bat-equipped gang bangers. Then, a seemingly friendly teacher and an assistant principal nearly come to blows when Froy and Sonia come around to repossess one of their vehicles Then, And finally, after the tow truck breaks down on the side of the road, Lou, Matt, and Froy are left with no options and stuck in the middle of a violent dispute between some gun-wielding neighbors.

programme.title: Yoga-to Be Kidding Me
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy head into a nice part of town to repossess a BMW from an entitled yuppie, but first they'll have to contend with his rampaging long-distance girlfriend. Then, Lou, Lyndah, and Matt venture into a trailer park where they find a debtor who's as angry as he is drunk. And finally, Sonia and Lyndah travel under the cover of night to repossess a vehicle from a young woman and her irate yoga instructor.

programme.title: What the Truck?!?
programme.desc: The repo team is back! On the premiere episode of the summer season of Operation Repo, Lou, Matt, Sonia, Froy, and Lyndah are back together and better than ever...although a secret meeting suggests trouble in paradise. This week, the team confronts a shady import/export warehouse filled with unpaid-for cars, a pair of reckless rodeo gals, and a cunning team of car thieves who don't even think twice before running off with the team's truck.

programme.title: Up in Flames
programme.desc: When Matt and Froy repo a car from an anger management meeting, Froy suffers the consequences of taking on a violent rage-aholic.

programme.title: Native Operation
programme.desc: First, Matt and Lou confront an ungentlemanly drunk at an upscale gentleman's club in an effort to repossess his late model BMW. Then, Sonia and Matt head over to the wrong side of the tracks to reclaim a motorcycle from a different kind of biker. And finally, Matt and Froy cross the border into a nearby reservation to wrangle with a belligerent debtor and two unimpressed representatives of the tribal police.

programme.title: Freddie
programme.desc: Lead singer of Queen, Freddie Mercury defies the conventions of a typical rock frontman. Known for his charismatic stage persona and four-octave vocal range, Freddie paves the way for many artists to have a confident and theatrical act.

programme.title: The Last Waltz
programme.desc: Seventeen years after joining forces as the backing band for rockabilly cult hero Ronnie Hawkins, Canadian roots rockers The Band call it quits with a lavish farewell show at San Francisco's Winterland Ballroom on Nov. 25, 1976. Filmed by Martin Scorsese, this documentary features standout performances by rock legends such as Bob Dylan, Van Morrison, Eric Clapton, Joni Mitchell and Muddy Waters, as well as interviews tracing the group's history and discussing road life.

programme.title: The Last 24 Hours
programme.desc: The world mourned the loss of one of it's most innovative performers in April 2016. While Prince's official autopsy confirmed that the singer died from an overdose of the painkiller fentanyl, investigators have still been looking to clear up some additional mysteries surrounding the case. We take a look into the last 24 hours of his death and look for the real answers as to what happened. Directed by Jordan Hill.

programme.title: The Last 24 Hours
programme.desc: The ultimate king of pop Michael Jackson spent his last hours battling insomnia and pleading with his personal physician to give him a powerful anesthetic to combat his chronic sleeplessness according to a search-warrant affidavit. We explore the truth behind this and discover the real facts, with exclusive footage and testimonials. Directed by Jordan Hill.

programme.title: Leguizamo Does America
programme.desc: Though often overlooked, Latinos have been making contributions to the culture of NYC all along. Whether through food, dance, music or fashion, Latinos have helped make this city what it is: A cultural hub that the world looks to for inspiration. John begins his journey in Jackson Heights, Queens, the borough that shaped him as a man and as an artist, where he highlights the Latino spot that helps make every borough feel like home…the Bodega. He then meets up with DJ Tony Touch to discuss the many ways in which Latinos helped build Hip-Hop culture. Later, he visits the Puerto Rican Traveling Theatre to discuss the lack of access Latinos have to Broadway stages. He then shines a light on Luar, a fashion brand created, owned and operated by Raul Lopez, a true kid from the barrio, who unlike so many Latino designers before him is getting the recognition he deserves. John also pays tribute to salsa music and the people who keep it alive throughout the city. Lastly, John hosts one of his “Legends Dinners” with the help of Colombian chef, Stephanie Del Carmen who focuses on cooking and honoring indigenous food. Food that John, comedian Aida Rodriguez, DJ Tony Touch, Fat Joe and Broadway star Sergio Trujillo enjoy while discussing all things Latin.

programme.title: Leguizamo Does America
programme.desc: John tours Miami's historic sector, Little Havana, with community leader Marvin Tapia, and discusses the influence of the Cuban community in Miami. He then meets with the Borges family who through hard work and sacrifice have turned their dreams of owning a Cuban Coffee shop into a reality. John later meets with actor, playwright and activist Carmen Pelaez to discuss the stronghold the right wing has had on the Latino community and the future of Miami politics. John then visits the arts district of Miami which has earned that title largely due to the Latinx artists who have painted its impressive walls. He speaks with Evoca1, a muralist whose ideology has influenced him to tell complex Latinx stories through his art. Later, John meets up with singer/songwriter Elena Rose to discuss the current state of Latin music, Miami as its hub, and the future for her and other women in the industry. John also visits Peruvian chef Juan Chipoco at his flagship restaurant, Ceviche 105 to learn about his journey to becoming a mogul in the industry, by honoring the food of his homeland. Lastly, John meets up with comedian George Harris, who has built community and gives immigrants a safe place to laugh and rejoice in stories that reflect their personal experiences.

programme.title: Leguizamo Does America
programme.desc: John first meets up with actor Diane Guerrero to chat about her experiences as an immigrant, author and activist over some of the best Latin food in town. He then meets up with Congressman Ritchie Torres from the Bronx to discuss the lack of Latinx representation in government and what can be done about it. John also speaks with Maria Teresa Kumar of Voto Latino to discuss the importance of voter registration within the Latinx community and how that will increase representation. And he goes canvassing to register potential voters with the help of activist and Vice President of Unidos US, Clarissa Martinez De Castro. John then takes a tour of the Smithsonian's Latin American History exhibition with Founding Director of The National Museum of the American Latino, Jorge Zamanillo to discuss the need for a proper museum that more accurately tells the Latinx story in this country. Later, John meets up with poet/activist Quique Aviles, who has lived in D.C. since he was a child and fights against gentrification through the spoken word. Lastly, John visits the Gala Theater and the immigrant kids who find their voices and their strength through performance art.

programme.title: Leguizamo Does America
programme.desc: John meets up with renowned actor Michael Peña to learn about what it was like to grow up in the Midwest, while still attempting to retain his Mexican culture. By participating in a Peña family barbeque, John sees first-hand just how much family and friends who become family, help keep traditions alive and create safe spaces for those making a new home in a strange land. John also meets up with Congressman Chuy Garcia, who works tirelessly to bring about equity in government on behalf of the Latinx community. John then connects with Mario Hernández Jr. who shows him around the borough of Pilson, where political murals (a tradition started in Mexico) line the streets. He then talks with local artists who are passing on the tradition of political art to the community through printmaking. John has a chat with some of Chicago's queer youth activists who are actively working to provide education and a safe environment for their peers. Lastly, John gets the lowdown on Humboldt Park from community leader, Mike Oquendo. He introduces John to the Humboldt Park firemen who are entirely Latino and break all stereotypes through their community activism.

programme.title: Leguizamo Does America
programme.desc: John travels to the island of Puerto Rico to highlight the many ways in which the island and its people have influenced American culture and the ways in which America is influencing theirs. A hot topic: the issue of statehood, which John finds out, not everyone supports. John learns the deep roots of resistance that lives in the hearts and minds of the Puerto Rican people.

programme.desc: In this musical comedy, Valerie (Geena Davis) is dealing with her philandering fiancé, Ted (Charles Rocket), when she finds that a trio of aliens (Jeff Goldblum, Jim Carrey, Damon Wayans) have crashed their spaceship into her swimming pool. Once the furry beings are shaved at her girlfriend's salon, the women discover three handsome men underneath. After absorbing the native culture via television, the spacemen are ready to hit the dating scene in 1980s Los Angeles.

programme.title: Tank Girl
programme.desc: After a comet disrupts the rain cycle of Earth, the planet has become a desolate, barren desert by the year 2033. With resources scarce, Kesslee (Malcolm McDowell) -- head of the powerful and evil Water & Power Corporation, the de facto government -- has taken control of the water supply. Unwilling to cower under Kesslee's tyrannical rule, a pair of outlaws known as Tank Girl (Lori Petty) and Jet Girl (Naomi Watts) rise up, joining the mysterious rebel Rippers to destroy the corrupt system.

programme.title: Mannequin Two: On the Move
programme.desc: Although Jason (William Ragsdale) works as a department store clerk, he is also a reincarnated prince. Long ago, his beloved Jessie (Kristy Swanson) was snatched away from him by an evil wizard (Terry Kiser) who used his powers to transform her into wooden statue. Now Jessie is in Jason's department store as a mannequin. When he encounters her, she awakens from her thousand-year sleep. They quickly revive their romance, but the evil wizard has been reincarnated as well, and he's up to no good.

programme.title: Masters of the Universe
programme.desc: When the evil Skeletor (Frank Langella) finds a mysterious power called the Cosmic Key, he becomes nearly invincible. However, courageous warrior He-Man (Dolph Lundgren) locates inventor Gwildor (Billy Barty), who created the Key and has another version of it. During a battle, one of the Keys is transported to Earth, where it is found by teenagers Julie (Courteney Cox) and Kevin (Robert Duncan McNeill). Now both He-Man and Skeletor's forces arrive on Earth searching for the potent weapon.

programme.desc: Ending off her Romantic Safari Adventure, Sika visits Welgevonden Game Reserve set in the spectacular Waterberg Biosphere district of South Africa's Limpopo Province. Her eighth destination FiftySeven Waterberg is one of the Country's finest Boutique Safari Lodges offering the unhindered gift of glorious Nature right on its doorstep. With a firm focus on Conservation efforts, Sika experience this Game Reserve on the forefront of proactive Conservation Management and also get to relax and enjoy warm hospitality in an Oasis of 5-star Luxury within the midst of the African Wilderness.

programme.title: On Safari
programme.sub-title: The Outpost Lodge, Northern Kruger National Park, Limpopo Province
programme.desc: Sika's Safari Adventure starts in the Northern Kruger National Park in the Limpopo Province, where THE OUTPOST Lodge rests high on a hill encompassed by stunning vistas of the Luvuvhu River set in the Makuleke Region that falls in the epicentre of the Great Limpopo Park, which comprises Kruger National Park, the Gaza National Park in Mozambique and the Gonarezhou National Park in Zimbabwe. Designed by an Italian born architect, Enrico Daffonchio using simple, clean lines and combining elements of steel and canvas, the stunning contemporary design of this Luxury Kruger Park Lodge emphasizes its beautiful surrounds but blends in with the Wilderness that is it's home.

programme.title: Above the Dolomites
programme.desc: Soar up and over Italy's iconic mountain range for a full hour of inspiration and relaxation with "Above the Dolomites." Featuring cinematography by new collaborator Ryan Shirley, and synchronized to new healing music by Antonio Resende, it offers some simply stunning views that showcase just why the Dolomites might be the world's most epic mountain range.

programme.title: Tropical Weightlessness
programme.desc: Gently sway in the tropical turquoise waters with a glimpse of blue sky and palm trees.

programme.title: Rainbow Reef Relaxation 2
programme.desc: Sit back, relax and enjoy the dazzling world of coral reefs in 4K you embark on a journey through some of the most vibrant underwater reefs on our blue planet - including many scenes which no longer look like this due to coral bleaching. From the cinematographer: "The footage for this film was shot over a period of some years in French Polynesia, Micronesia, Indonesia and East Timor. Unfortunately there are not that vibrant anymore today. Coral reefs have suffered from the rise of water temperature, rise in acidity, destructive fishing methods and severe storms caused by climate change." - Peter Schneider. "Rainbow Reef Relaxation" is a 3-hour long, sweeping yet majestic & vibrant underwater journey to the world's most beautiful lagoons, as captured by Nature Relaxation collaborator Peter Schneider (Underwatercam) paired with ambient underwater sounds and brand new ambient music by the Cynic Project. Filmed in High Definition several years ago, thanks to its age this film offers magical glimpses of an underwater world that is bursting with life, color, and beauty.

programme.title: Shades of Color
programme.desc: Shades of Color S1E11: Shades Of Brown — Celebrate the rich and earthy palette of brown. From warm sepia tones to deep siennas, the artwork evoke a sense of grounded elegance and rustic charm, exploring the diverse emotions and textures of this versatile color.

programme.title: Shades of Color
programme.desc: Shades of Color S1E2: Shades of Green — Explore a stunning art collection celebrating the color green. From lush landscapes to abstract works, this collection showcases the versatility and serenity of green in a myriad of artistic expressions.

programme.title: Shades Of Color: Shades Of Gold
programme.desc: Shades Of Color S1E13: Shades Of Gold — Experience the opulent allure of an art collection adorned with the lustrous elegance of gold. These works illuminate creativity, from shimmering landscapes to gilded abstractions, embodying the richness of this resplendent hue.

programme.title: Shades of Color
programme.desc: Shades of Color: Shades Of Gold E13 — A luminous art collection celebrating fortune, warmth, and the rich glow of possibility. Spanning diverse mediums, each piece shimmers with golden hues, while the soundtrack infuses the experience with lively, mystical charm.

programme.title: Spring Forward: Spring Impressions
programme.desc: Spring Forward: Spring Impressions E3 — Celebrate the beauty of spring through the luminous brushstrokes of Impressionism. Featuring works by contemporary artists & old masters, the art is accompanied by contemporary classical music, immersing viewers in the colors & rhythms of the season.

programme.title: Happy Hour
